findings.title: WorkerLocalSecretsManager lacks NODE_ENV=production constructor guard
findings.detail: WorkerLocalSecretsManager class can be directly instantiated in production without throwing. buildWorkerSecretsManager() correctly branches to AwsSecretsManager in prod (the real safety gate), but the class itself has no guard. Latent risk for future refactor. it.skip at dev-secret.integration.test.ts:265 surfaces this honestly per D-9 and ADR-R3.
findings.remediation: Separate product PR: add if (process.env['NODE_ENV'] === 'production') { throw new Error('[WorkerLocalSecretsManager] FATAL: ...') } to constructor. The it.skip test assertion is already written and will pass once the guard is added.

checks.non_inert_isolation_controls: PASS — assertBrainApp called before every isolation assertion; appPool=BRAIN_APP_DATABASE_URL; cross-brand count===0 runs under brain_app NOBYPASSRLS; empty-string 22P02 revert-RED is an explicit revert simulation, not tautological
checks.no_secrets_in_fixtures: PASS — TEST_CLIENT_SECRET='test-shopify-client-secret-b2' (synthetic); TEST_ACCESS_TOKEN='shpat_test_dev_secret_round_trip_token_abc123' (synthetic); all ARNs use account 000000000000; HMAC uses synthetic secret set via env in beforeAll
checks.no_pii_in_fixtures: PASS — customer:null in all 600 fake orders; no email/phone/address fields populated
checks.no_60d543dc_reference: PASS — grep: 0 hits in SQL/seed calls; all 7 occurrences are NEVER-marker comments
checks.no_product_code_change: PASS — all 8 changed apps/ files are tests/e2e/helpers paths; 0 migrations; 0 product src files changed
checks.adr_r3_honest_handling: PASS — it.skip with full documented bug comment at dev-secret.integration.test.ts:265; no fix attempted; surfaces as follow-up requirement
checks.adr_r3_severity: MED — latent risk, not blocking; buildWorkerSecretsManager() is the real prod-safety gate today
checks.afterAll_cleanup: PASS — every test file has afterAll deleting seeded rows in FK dependency order via superPool
checks.verification_validity: PASS — no bypass-green, no inert probe; revert-RED assertions are structurally non-tautological
